---
name: "Book change"
about: "Report an error or suggest an update to the book content. Use this template to propose corrections, improvements, or additions to the book."
title: "[book] "
labels: ["documentation","book"]
assignees: []
---

<!-- Please fill out the sections below. Remove any that don't apply. -->

### Summary
A short, one-line description of the change or issue.

### Location
Which chapter, page, file, or section does this affect? Include links or page numbers if possible.

### Current text / behavior
Quote the current text or describe the current behavior.

### Suggested change
Explain the correction or proposed wording, with a short rationale.

### Motivation
Why is this change needed? Does it fix an error, improve clarity, or add missing information?

### Implementation notes (optional)
If you can, provide a proposed patch, code snippet, or specific edits. Indicate files to update.

### Impact
Does this change affect other chapters or examples? Is it backwards-incompatible?

### Screenshots or examples (if applicable)
Paste images or code blocks that help illustrate the issue.

### Checklist
- [ ] I have searched for existing issues and PRs about this.
- [ ] I can open a PR to implement this change (or I will describe required changes).
- [ ] I have included references (page numbers, links, or commits) when applicable.

### Related issues / PRs
Links to any related issues or pull requests.
